Declaration Of Suzette Z. Torres In Support Of Commonwealth Land Title Company'S Application For An Order For Sale Of A Dwelling
Off Calendar Aug-15-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Marta Thumas (650.295.9268) defendant and responding party appearing in propria persona

No other appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF COMMONWEALTH LAND TITLE COMPANY'S APPLICATION FOR AN ORDER FOR SALE OF A DWELLING is granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
